# infraInitEmptyRepo

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the infraInitEmptyRepo mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk infra-init-empty-repo --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.sId <UUID> --input.storeId <UUID>
```

## Examples

### Run infraInitEmptyRepo
